newsItem.headline: Faye features in Coupe de France; returns to competitive action after injury

newNews.reasoning: Research confirms Faye has returned to competitive action by January 2026 after foot injury setback, contradicting current injury status. This appearance record validates recovery and supports status change from injury to squad_rotation.

statusChanges.source: Jan 10, 2026 Coupe de France appearance; Feb 7, 2026 Ligue 1 return confirmation
